data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes decision-making time by simplifying choices on the website.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation and menu options for easier user decisions.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes button sizes and layout for improved accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons conforming to Fitts's law for action-heavy pages.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Uses principles like proximity, similarity, and closure to enhance visual coherence.
data.technical_spec: Groupings and layout alignments following Gestalt theories to guide user attention.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits chunks of information to enhance information retention.
data.technical_spec: Content is segmented into manageable parts to improve comprehension.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes visual appeal to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Sleek design using Apple’s visual language conveying simplicity and elegance.
